hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
nav_style: inline in hero — no separate nav bar, links inside hero
scroll_animation: playful — elements slide/bounce in from different directions
footer_style: playful — with an emoji or easter egg
color_scheme: light mode with dark hero section
quirk: use a single accent color — everything else is grayscale
bonus_quirk: add a subtle scanline/CRT effect over the hero section
